abra.spoken: Abra! National Number 63. The Psi Pokemon. This Pokemon is Psychic type, standing 0.9 meters tall and weighing 19.5 kilograms. Using its ability to read minds, it will identify impending danger and Teleport to safety. Evolution: Abra to Kadabra to Alakazam.

aerodactyl.spoken: Aerodactyl! National Number 142. The Fossil Pokemon. This Pokemon is Rock / Flying type, standing 1.8 meters tall and weighing 59.0 kilograms. A ferocious, pre­ historic Pokemon that goes for the enemy's throat with its serrated saw-like fangs. Aerodactyl does not evolve.

alakazam.spoken: Alakazam! National Number 65. The Psi Pokemon. This Pokemon is Psychic type, standing 1.5 meters tall and weighing 48.0 kilograms. Its brain can out­ perform a super­ computer. Its intelligence quotient is said to be 5,000. Evolution: Abra to Kadabra to Alakazam.

arbok.spoken: Arbok! National Number 24. The Cobra Pokemon. This Pokemon is Poison type, standing 3.5 meters tall and weighing 65.0 kilograms. It is rumored that the ferocious warning markings on its belly differ from area to area. Evolution: Ekans to Arbok.

arcanine.spoken: Arcanine! National Number 59. The Legendary Pokemon. This Pokemon is Fire type, standing 1.9 meters tall and weighing 155.0 kilograms. A Pokemon that has been admired since the past for its beauty. It runs agilely as if on wings. Evolution: Growlithe to Arcanine.

articuno.spoken: Articuno! National Number 144. The Freeze Pokemon. This Pokemon is Ice / Flying type, standing 1.7 meters tall and weighing 55.4 kilograms. A legendary bird Pokemon that is said to appear to doomed people who are lost in icy mountains. Articuno does not evolve.

beedrill.spoken: Beedrill! National Number 15. The Poison Bee Pokemon. This Pokemon is Bug / Poison type, standing 1.0 meters tall and weighing 29.5 kilograms. Flies at high speed and attacks using its large venomous stingers on its forelegs and tail. Evolution: Weedle to Kakuna to Beedrill.

bellsprout.spoken: Bellsprout! National Number 69. The Flower Pokemon. This Pokemon is Grass / Poison type, standing 0.7 meters tall and weighing 4.0 kilograms. A carnivorous Pokemon that traps and eats bugs. It uses its root feet to soak up needed moisture. Evolution: Bellsprout to Weepinbell to Victreebel.

blastoise.spoken: Blastoise! National Number 9. The Shellfish Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water type, standing 1.6 meters tall and weighing 85.5 kilograms. A brutal Pokemon with pressurized water jets on its shell. They are used for high speed tackles. Evolution: Squirtle to Wartortle to Blastoise.

bulbasaur.spoken: Bulbasaur! National Number 1. The Seed Pokemon. This Pokemon is Grass / Poison type, standing 0.7 meters tall and weighing 6.9 kilograms. A strange seed was planted on its back at birth. The plant sprouts and grows with this Pokemon. Evolution: Bulbasaur to Ivysaur to Venusaur.

butterfree.spoken: Butterfree! National Number 12. The Butterfly Pokemon. This Pokemon is Bug / Flying type, standing 1.1 meters tall and weighing 32.0 kilograms. In battle, it flaps its wings at high speed to release highly toxic dust into the air. Evolution: Caterpie to Metapod to Butterfree.

caterpie.spoken: Caterpie! National Number 10. The Worm Pokemon. This Pokemon is Bug type, standing 0.3 meters tall and weighing 2.9 kilograms. Its short feet are tipped with suction pads that enable it to tirelessly climb slopes and walls. Evolution: Caterpie to Metapod to Butterfree.

chansey.spoken: Chansey! National Number 113. The Egg Pokemon. This Pokemon is Normal type, standing 1.1 meters tall and weighing 34.6 kilograms. A rare and elusive Pokemon that is said to bring happiness to those who manage to get it. Evolution: Happiny to Chansey to Blissey.

charizard.spoken: Charizard! National Number 6. The Flame Pokemon. This Pokemon is Fire / Flying type, standing 1.7 meters tall and weighing 90.5 kilograms. It is said that Charizard's fire burns hotter if it has experienced harsh battles. Evolution: Charmander to Charmeleon to Charizard.

charmander.spoken: Charmander! National Number 4. The Lizard Pokemon. This Pokemon is Fire type, standing 0.6 meters tall and weighing 8.5 kilograms. Obviously prefers hot places. When it rains, steam is said to spout from the tip of its tail. Evolution: Charmander to Charmeleon to Charizard.

charmeleon.spoken: Charmeleon! National Number 5. The Flame Pokemon. This Pokemon is Fire type, standing 1.1 meters tall and weighing 19.0 kilograms. When it swings its burning tail, it elevates the temperature to unbearably high levels. Evolution: Charmander to Charmeleon to Charizard.

clefable.spoken: Clefable! National Number 36. The Fairy Pokemon. This Pokemon is Fairy type, standing 1.3 meters tall and weighing 40.0 kilograms. A timid fairy Pokemon that is rarely seen. It will run and hide the moment it senses people. Evolution: Cleffa to Clefairy to Clefable.

clefairy.spoken: Clefairy! National Number 35. The Fairy Pokemon. This Pokemon is Fairy type, standing 0.6 meters tall and weighing 7.5 kilograms. Its magical and cute appeal has many admirers. It is rare and found only in certain areas. Evolution: Cleffa to Clefairy to Clefable.

cloyster.spoken: Cloyster! National Number 91. The Bivalve Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water / Ice type, standing 1.5 meters tall and weighing 132.5 kilograms. When attacked, it launches its horns in quick volleys. Its innards have never been seen. Evolution: Shellder to Cloyster.

cubone.spoken: Cubone! National Number 104. The Lonely Pokemon. This Pokemon is Ground type, standing 0.4 meters tall and weighing 6.5 kilograms. Because it never removes its skull helmet, no one has ever seen this Pokemon's real face. Evolution: Cubone to Marowak.

dewgong.spoken: Dewgong! National Number 87. The Sea Lion Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water / Ice type, standing 1.7 meters tall and weighing 120.0 kilograms. Stores thermal energy in its body. Swims at a steady 8 knots even in intensely cold waters. Evolution: Seel to Dewgong.

diglett.spoken: Diglett! National Number 50. The Mole Pokemon. This Pokemon is Ground type, standing 0.2 meters tall and weighing 0.8 kilograms. Lives about one yard underground where it feeds on plant roots. It sometimes appears above ground. Evolution: Diglett to Dugtrio.

ditto.spoken: Ditto! National Number 132. The Transform Pokemon. This Pokemon is Normal type, standing 0.3 meters tall and weighing 4.0 kilograms. When it spots an enemy, its body transfigures into an almost-perfect copy of its opponent. Ditto does not evolve.

dodrio.spoken: Dodrio! National Number 85. The Triple Bird Pokemon. This Pokemon is Normal / Flying type, standing 1.8 meters tall and weighing 85.2 kilograms. Uses its three brains to execute complex plans. While two heads sleep, one head stays awake. Evolution: Doduo to Dodrio.

doduo.spoken: Doduo! National Number 84. The Twin Bird Pokemon. This Pokemon is Normal / Flying type, standing 1.4 meters tall and weighing 39.2 kilograms. A bird that makes up for its poor flying with its fast foot speed. Leaves giant footprints. Evolution: Doduo to Dodrio.

dragonair.spoken: Dragonair! National Number 148. The Dragon Pokemon. This Pokemon is Dragon type, standing 4.0 meters tall and weighing 16.5 kilograms. A mystical Pokemon that exudes a gentle aura. Has the ability to change climate conditions. Evolution: Dratini to Dragonair to Dragonite.

dragonite.spoken: Dragonite! National Number 149. The Dragon Pokemon. This Pokemon is Dragon / Flying type, standing 2.2 meters tall and weighing 210.0 kilograms. An extremely rarely seen marine Pokemon. Its intelligence is said to match that of humans. Evolution: Dratini to Dragonair to Dragonite.

dratini.spoken: Dratini! National Number 147. The Dragon Pokemon. This Pokemon is Dragon type, standing 1.8 meters tall and weighing 3.3 kilograms. Long considered a mythical Pokemon until recently when a small colony was found living underwater. Evolution: Dratini to Dragonair to Dragonite.

drowzee.spoken: Drowzee! National Number 96. The Hypnosis Pokemon. This Pokemon is Psychic type, standing 1.0 meters tall and weighing 32.4 kilograms. Puts enemies to sleep then eats their dreams. Occasionally gets sick from eating bad dreams. Evolution: Drowzee to Hypno.

dugtrio.spoken: Dugtrio! National Number 51. The Mole Pokemon. This Pokemon is Ground type, standing 0.7 meters tall and weighing 33.3 kilograms. A team of Diglett triplets. It triggers huge earthquakes by burrowing 60 miles underground. Evolution: Diglett to Dugtrio.

eevee.spoken: Eevee! National Number 133. The Evolution Pokemon. This Pokemon is Normal type, standing 0.3 meters tall and weighing 6.5 kilograms. Its genetic code is irregular. It may mutate if it is exposed to radiation from element Stones. Evolution: Eevee to Vaporeon to Jolteon to Flareon to Espeon to Umbreon to Leafeon to Glaceon to Sylveon.

ekans.spoken: Ekans! National Number 23. The Snake Pokemon. This Pokemon is Poison type, standing 2.0 meters tall and weighing 6.9 kilograms. Moves silently and stealthily. Eats the eggs of birds, such as Pidgey and Spearow, whole. Evolution: Ekans to Arbok.

electabuzz.spoken: Electabuzz! National Number 125. The Electric Pokemon. This Pokemon is Electric type, standing 1.1 meters tall and weighing 30.0 kilograms. Normally found near power plants, they can wander away and cause major blackouts in cities. Evolution: Elekid to Electabuzz to Electivire.

electrode.spoken: Electrode! National Number 101. The Ball Pokemon. This Pokemon is Electric type, standing 1.2 meters tall and weighing 66.6 kilograms. It stores electric energy under very high pressure. It often explodes with little or no provocation. Evolution: Voltorb to Electrode.

exeggcute.spoken: Exeggcute! National Number 102. The Egg Pokemon. This Pokemon is Grass / Psychic type, standing 0.4 meters tall and weighing 2.5 kilograms. Using telepathy only they can receive, they always form a cluster of six Exeggcute. Evolution: Exeggcute to Exeggutor.

exeggutor.spoken: Exeggutor! National Number 103. The Coconut Pokemon. This Pokemon is Grass / Psychic type, standing 2.0 meters tall and weighing 120.0 kilograms. Legend has it that on rare occasions, one of its heads will drop off and continue on as an Exeggcute. Evolution: Exeggcute to Exeggutor.

farfetchd.spoken: Farfetch'd! National Number 83. The Wild Duck Pokemon. This Pokemon is Normal / Flying type, standing 0.8 meters tall and weighing 15.0 kilograms. The sprig of green onions it holds is its weapon. It is used much like a metal sword. Evolution: Farfetchd to Sirfetchd.

fearow.spoken: Fearow! National Number 22. The Beak Pokemon. This Pokemon is Normal / Flying type, standing 1.2 meters tall and weighing 38.0 kilograms. With its huge and magnificent wings, it can keep aloft without ever having to land for rest. Evolution: Spearow to Fearow.

flareon.spoken: Flareon! National Number 136. The Flame Pokemon. This Pokemon is Fire type, standing 0.9 meters tall and weighing 25.0 kilograms. When storing thermal energy in its body, its temperature could soar to over 1600 degrees. Evolution: Eevee to Vaporeon to Jolteon to Flareon to Espeon to Umbreon to Leafeon to Glaceon to Sylveon.

gastly.spoken: Gastly! National Number 92. The Gas Pokemon. This Pokemon is Ghost / Poison type, standing 1.3 meters tall and weighing 0.1 kilograms. Almost invisible, this gaseous Pokemon cloaks the target and puts it to sleep without notice. Evolution: Gastly to Haunter to Gengar.

gengar.spoken: Gengar! National Number 94. The Shadow Pokemon. This Pokemon is Ghost / Poison type, standing 1.5 meters tall and weighing 40.5 kilograms. Under a full moon, this Pokemon likes to mimic the shadows of people and laugh at their fright. Evolution: Gastly to Haunter to Gengar.

geodude.spoken: Geodude! National Number 74. The Rock Pokemon. This Pokemon is Rock / Ground type, standing 0.4 meters tall and weighing 20.0 kilograms. Found in fields and mountains. Mistaking them for boulders, people often step or trip on them. Evolution: Geodude to Graveler to Golem.

gloom.spoken: Gloom! National Number 44. The Weed Pokemon. This Pokemon is Grass / Poison type, standing 0.8 meters tall and weighing 8.6 kilograms. The fluid that oozes from its mouth isn't drool. It is a nectar that is used to attract prey. Evolution: Oddish to Gloom to Vileplume to Bellossom.

golbat.spoken: Golbat! National Number 42. The Bat Pokemon. This Pokemon is Poison / Flying type, standing 1.6 meters tall and weighing 55.0 kilograms. Once it strikes, it will not stop draining energy from the victim even if it gets too heavy to fly. Evolution: Zubat to Golbat to Crobat.

goldeen.spoken: Goldeen! National Number 118. The Goldfish Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water type, standing 0.6 meters tall and weighing 15.0 kilograms. Its tail fin billows like an elegant ballroom dress, giving it the nickname of the Water Queen. Evolution: Goldeen to Seaking.

golduck.spoken: Golduck! National Number 55. The Duck Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water type, standing 1.7 meters tall and weighing 76.6 kilograms. Often seen swim­ ming elegantly by lake shores. It is often mistaken for the Japanese monster, Kappa. Evolution: Psyduck to Golduck.

golem.spoken: Golem! National Number 76. The Megaton Pokemon. This Pokemon is Rock / Ground type, standing 1.4 meters tall and weighing 300.0 kilograms. Its boulder-like body is extremely hard. It can easily withstand dynamite blasts without damage. Evolution: Geodude to Graveler to Golem.

graveler.spoken: Graveler! National Number 75. The Rock Pokemon. This Pokemon is Rock / Ground type, standing 1.0 meters tall and weighing 105.0 kilograms. Rolls down slopes to move. It rolls over any obstacle without slowing or changing its direction. Evolution: Geodude to Graveler to Golem.

grimer.spoken: Grimer! National Number 88. The Sludge Pokemon. This Pokemon is Poison type, standing 0.9 meters tall and weighing 30.0 kilograms. Appears in filthy areas. Thrives by sucking up polluted sludge that is pumped out of factories. Evolution: Grimer to Muk.

growlithe.spoken: Growlithe! National Number 58. The Puppy Pokemon. This Pokemon is Fire type, standing 0.7 meters tall and weighing 19.0 kilograms. Very protective of its territory. It will bark and bite to repel intruders from its space. Evolution: Growlithe to Arcanine.

gyarados.spoken: Gyarados! National Number 130. The Atrocious Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water / Flying type, standing 6.5 meters tall and weighing 235.0 kilograms. Rarely seen in the wild. Huge and vicious, it is capable of destroying entire cities in a rage. Evolution: Magikarp to Gyarados.

haunter.spoken: Haunter! National Number 93. The Gas Pokemon. This Pokemon is Ghost / Poison type, standing 1.6 meters tall and weighing 0.1 kilograms. Because of its ability to slip through block walls, it is said to be from an­ other dimension. Evolution: Gastly to Haunter to Gengar.

hitmonchan.spoken: Hitmonchan! National Number 107. The Punching Pokemon. This Pokemon is Fighting type, standing 1.4 meters tall and weighing 50.2 kilograms. The arm-twisting punches it throws pulverize even concrete. It rests after three minutes of fighting. Evolution: Tyrogue to Hitmonlee to Hitmonchan to Hitmontop.

hitmonlee.spoken: Hitmonlee! National Number 106. The Kicking Pokemon. This Pokemon is Fighting type, standing 1.5 meters tall and weighing 49.8 kilograms. When in a hurry, its legs lengthen progressively. It runs smoothly with extra long, loping strides. Evolution: Tyrogue to Hitmonlee to Hitmonchan to Hitmontop.

horsea.spoken: Horsea! National Number 116. The Dragon Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water type, standing 0.4 meters tall and weighing 8.0 kilograms. Known to shoot down flying bugs with precision blasts of ink from the surface of the water. Evolution: Horsea to Seadra to Kingdra.

hypno.spoken: Hypno! National Number 97. The Hypnosis Pokemon. This Pokemon is Psychic type, standing 1.6 meters tall and weighing 75.6 kilograms. When it locks eyes with an enemy, it will use a mix of Psi moves such as Hypnosis and Confusion. Evolution: Drowzee to Hypno.

ivysaur.spoken: Ivysaur! National Number 2. The Seed Pokemon. This Pokemon is Grass / Poison type, standing 1.0 meters tall and weighing 13.0 kilograms. When the bulb on its back grows large, it appears to lose the ability to stand on its hind legs. Evolution: Bulbasaur to Ivysaur to Venusaur.

jigglypuff.spoken: Jigglypuff! National Number 39. The Balloon Pokemon. This Pokemon is Normal / Fairy type, standing 0.5 meters tall and weighing 5.5 kilograms. When its huge eyes light up, it sings a mysteriously soothing melody that lulls its enemies to sleep. Evolution: Igglybuff to Jigglypuff to Wigglytuff.

jolteon.spoken: Jolteon! National Number 135. The Lightning Pokemon. This Pokemon is Electric type, standing 0.8 meters tall and weighing 24.5 kilograms. It accumulates negative ions in the atmosphere to blast out 10000- volt lightning bolts. Evolution: Eevee to Vaporeon to Jolteon to Flareon to Espeon to Umbreon to Leafeon to Glaceon to Sylveon.

jynx.spoken: Jynx! National Number 124. The Human Shape Pokemon. This Pokemon is Ice / Psychic type, standing 1.4 meters tall and weighing 40.6 kilograms. It seductively wiggles its hips as it walks. It can cause people to dance in unison with it. Evolution: Smoochum to Jynx.

kabuto.spoken: Kabuto! National Number 140. The Shellfish Pokemon. This Pokemon is Rock / Water type, standing 0.5 meters tall and weighing 11.5 kilograms. A Pokemon that was resurrected from a fossil found in what was once the ocean floor eons ago. Evolution: Kabuto to Kabutops.

kabutops.spoken: Kabutops! National Number 141. The Shellfish Pokemon. This Pokemon is Rock / Water type, standing 1.3 meters tall and weighing 40.5 kilograms. Kabutops slices its prey apart and sucks out the fluids. The discarded body parts become food for other Pokemon. Evolution: Kabuto to Kabutops.

kadabra.spoken: Kadabra! National Number 64. The Psi Pokemon. This Pokemon is Psychic type, standing 1.3 meters tall and weighing 56.5 kilograms. It emits special alpha waves from its body that induce headaches just by being close by. Evolution: Abra to Kadabra to Alakazam.

kakuna.spoken: Kakuna! National Number 14. The Cocoon Pokemon. This Pokemon is Bug / Poison type, standing 0.6 meters tall and weighing 10.0 kilograms. Almost incapable of moving, this Pokemon can only harden its shell to protect itself from predators. Evolution: Weedle to Kakuna to Beedrill.

kangaskhan.spoken: Kangaskhan! National Number 115. The Parent Pokemon. This Pokemon is Normal type, standing 2.2 meters tall and weighing 80.0 kilograms. The infant rarely ventures out of its mother's protective pouch until it is 3 years old. Kangaskhan does not evolve.

kingler.spoken: Kingler! National Number 99. The Pincer Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water type, standing 1.3 meters tall and weighing 60.0 kilograms. The large pincer has 10000 hp of crushing power. However, its huge size makes it unwieldy to use. Evolution: Krabby to Kingler.

koffing.spoken: Koffing! National Number 109. The Poison Gas Pokemon. This Pokemon is Poison type, standing 0.6 meters tall and weighing 1.0 kilograms. Because it stores several kinds of toxic gases in its body, it is prone to exploding without warning. Evolution: Koffing to Weezing.

krabby.spoken: Krabby! National Number 98. The River Crab Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water type, standing 0.4 meters tall and weighing 6.5 kilograms. Its pincers are not only powerful weapons, they are used for balance when walking sideways. Evolution: Krabby to Kingler.

lapras.spoken: Lapras! National Number 131. The Transport Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water / Ice type, standing 2.5 meters tall and weighing 220.0 kilograms. A Pokemon that has been over­ hunted almost to extinction. It can ferry people across the water. Lapras does not evolve.

lickitung.spoken: Lickitung! National Number 108. The Licking Pokemon. This Pokemon is Normal type, standing 1.2 meters tall and weighing 65.5 kilograms. Its tongue can be extended like a chameleon's. It leaves a tingling sensation when it licks enemies. Evolution: Lickitung to Lickilicky.

machamp.spoken: Machamp! National Number 68. The Superpower Pokemon. This Pokemon is Fighting type, standing 1.6 meters tall and weighing 130.0 kilograms. Using its heavy muscles, it throws powerful punches that can send the victim clear over the horizon. Evolution: Machop to Machoke to Machamp.

machoke.spoken: Machoke! National Number 67. The Superpower Pokemon. This Pokemon is Fighting type, standing 1.5 meters tall and weighing 70.5 kilograms. It happily carries heavy cargo to toughen up. It willingly does hard work for people. Evolution: Machop to Machoke to Machamp.

machop.spoken: Machop! National Number 66. The Superpower Pokemon. This Pokemon is Fighting type, standing 0.8 meters tall and weighing 19.5 kilograms. Loves to build its muscles. It trains in all styles of martial arts to become even stronger. Evolution: Machop to Machoke to Machamp.

magikarp.spoken: Magikarp! National Number 129. The Fish Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water type, standing 0.9 meters tall and weighing 10.0 kilograms. In the distant past, it was somewhat stronger than the horribly weak descendants that exist today. Evolution: Magikarp to Gyarados.

magmar.spoken: Magmar! National Number 126. The Spitfire Pokemon. This Pokemon is Fire type, standing 1.3 meters tall and weighing 44.5 kilograms. Its body always burns with an orange glow that enables it to hide perfectly among flames. Evolution: Magby to Magmar to Magmortar.

magnemite.spoken: Magnemite! National Number 81. The Magnet Pokemon. This Pokemon is Electric / Steel type, standing 0.3 meters tall and weighing 6.0 kilograms. Uses anti-gravity to stay suspended. Appears without warning and uses Thunder Wave and similar moves. Evolution: Magnemite to Magneton to Magnezone.

magneton.spoken: Magneton! National Number 82. The Magnet Pokemon. This Pokemon is Electric / Steel type, standing 1.0 meters tall and weighing 60.0 kilograms. Formed by several Magnemites linked together. They frequently appear when sunspots flare up. Evolution: Magnemite to Magneton to Magnezone.

mankey.spoken: Mankey! National Number 56. The Pig Monkey Pokemon. This Pokemon is Fighting type, standing 0.5 meters tall and weighing 28.0 kilograms. Extremely quick to anger. It could be docile one moment then thrashing away the next instant. Evolution: Mankey to Primeape to Annihilape.

marowak.spoken: Marowak! National Number 105. The Bone Keeper Pokemon. This Pokemon is Ground type, standing 1.0 meters tall and weighing 45.0 kilograms. The bone it holds is its key weapon. It throws the bone skillfully like a boomerang to knock out targets. Evolution: Cubone to Marowak.

meowth.spoken: Meowth! National Number 52. The Scratch Cat Pokemon. This Pokemon is Normal type, standing 0.4 meters tall and weighing 4.2 kilograms. Adores circular objects. Wanders the streets on a nightly basis to look for dropped loose change. Evolution: Meowth to Persian to Perrserker.

metapod.spoken: Metapod! National Number 11. The Cocoon Pokemon. This Pokemon is Bug type, standing 0.7 meters tall and weighing 9.9 kilograms. This Pokemon is vulnerable to attack while its shell is soft, exposing its weak and tender body. Evolution: Caterpie to Metapod to Butterfree.

mew.spoken: Mew! National Number 151. The New Species Pokemon. This Pokemon is Psychic type, standing 0.4 meters tall and weighing 4.0 kilograms. So rare that it is still said to be a mirage by many experts. Only a few people have seen it worldwide. Mew does not evolve.

mewtwo.spoken: Mewtwo! National Number 150. The Genetic Pokemon. This Pokemon is Psychic type, standing 2.0 meters tall and weighing 122.0 kilograms. It was created by a scientist after years of horrific gene splicing and DNA engineering experiments. Mewtwo does not evolve.

moltres.spoken: Moltres! National Number 146. The Flame Pokemon. This Pokemon is Fire / Flying type, standing 2.0 meters tall and weighing 60.0 kilograms. Known as the legendary bird of fire. Every flap of its wings creates a dazzling flash of flames. Moltres does not evolve.

mr-mime.spoken: Mr. Mime! National Number 122. The Barrier Pokemon. This Pokemon is Psychic / Fairy type, standing 1.3 meters tall and weighing 54.5 kilograms. If interrupted while it is miming, it will slap around the offender with its broad hands. Evolution: Mime Jr to Mr Mime to Mr Rime.

muk.spoken: Muk! National Number 89. The Sludge Pokemon. This Pokemon is Poison type, standing 1.2 meters tall and weighing 30.0 kilograms. Thickly covered with a filthy, vile sludge. It is so toxic, even its footprints contain poison. Evolution: Grimer to Muk.

nidoking.spoken: Nidoking! National Number 34. The Drill Pokemon. This Pokemon is Poison / Ground type, standing 1.4 meters tall and weighing 62.0 kilograms. It uses its powerful tail in battle to smash, constrict, then break the prey's bones. Evolution: Nidoran M to Nidorino to Nidoking.

nidoqueen.spoken: Nidoqueen! National Number 31. The Drill Pokemon. This Pokemon is Poison / Ground type, standing 1.3 meters tall and weighing 60.0 kilograms. Its hard scales provide strong protection. It uses its hefty bulk to execute powerful moves. Evolution: Nidoran F to Nidorina to Nidoqueen.

nidoran-f.spoken: Nidoran female! National Number 29. The Poison Pin Pokemon. This Pokemon is Poison type, standing 0.4 meters tall and weighing 7.0 kilograms. Although small, its venomous barbs render this Pokemon dangerous. The female has smaller horns. Evolution: Nidoran F to Nidorina to Nidoqueen.

nidoran-m.spoken: Nidoran male! National Number 32. The Poison Pin Pokemon. This Pokemon is Poison type, standing 0.5 meters tall and weighing 9.0 kilograms. Stiffens its ears to sense danger. The larger its horns, the more powerful its secreted venom. Evolution: Nidoran M to Nidorino to Nidoking.

nidorina.spoken: Nidorina! National Number 30. The Poison Pin Pokemon. This Pokemon is Poison type, standing 0.8 meters tall and weighing 20.0 kilograms. The female's horn develops slowly. Prefers physical attacks such as clawing and biting. Evolution: Nidoran F to Nidorina to Nidoqueen.

nidorino.spoken: Nidorino! National Number 33. The Poison Pin Pokemon. This Pokemon is Poison type, standing 0.9 meters tall and weighing 19.5 kilograms. An aggressive Pokemon that is quick to attack. The horn on its head secretes a powerful venom. Evolution: Nidoran M to Nidorino to Nidoking.

ninetales.spoken: Ninetales! National Number 38. The Fox Pokemon. This Pokemon is Fire type, standing 1.1 meters tall and weighing 19.9 kilograms. Very smart and very vengeful. Grabbing one of its many tails could result in a 1000-year curse. Evolution: Vulpix to Ninetales.

oddish.spoken: Oddish! National Number 43. The Weed Pokemon. This Pokemon is Grass / Poison type, standing 0.5 meters tall and weighing 5.4 kilograms. During the day, it keeps its face buried in the ground. At night, it wanders around sowing its seeds. Evolution: Oddish to Gloom to Vileplume to Bellossom.

omanyte.spoken: Omanyte! National Number 138. The Spiral Pokemon. This Pokemon is Rock / Water type, standing 0.4 meters tall and weighing 7.5 kilograms. Although long extinct, in rare cases, it can be genetically resurrected from fossils. Evolution: Omanyte to Omastar.

omastar.spoken: Omastar! National Number 139. The Spiral Pokemon. This Pokemon is Rock / Water type, standing 1.0 meters tall and weighing 35.0 kilograms. A prehistoric Pokemon that died out when its heavy shell made it impossible to catch prey. Evolution: Omanyte to Omastar.

onix.spoken: Onix! National Number 95. The Rock Snake Pokemon. This Pokemon is Rock / Ground type, standing 8.8 meters tall and weighing 210.0 kilograms. It burrows through the ground at a speed of 50 mph while feeding on large boulders. Evolution: Onix to Steelix.

paras.spoken: Paras! National Number 46. The Mushroom Pokemon. This Pokemon is Bug / Grass type, standing 0.3 meters tall and weighing 5.4 kilograms. Burrows to suck tree roots. The mushrooms on its back grow by draw­ ing nutrients from the bug host. Evolution: Paras to Parasect.

parasect.spoken: Parasect! National Number 47. The Mushroom Pokemon. This Pokemon is Bug / Grass type, standing 1.0 meters tall and weighing 29.5 kilograms. It stays mostly in dark, damp places, the preference not of the bug, but of the big mush­ rooms on its back. Evolution: Paras to Parasect.

persian.spoken: Persian! National Number 53. The Classy Cat Pokemon. This Pokemon is Normal type, standing 1.0 meters tall and weighing 32.0 kilograms. Although its fur has many admirers, it is tough to raise as a pet because of its fickle meanness. Evolution: Meowth to Persian to Perrserker.

pidgeot.spoken: Pidgeot! National Number 18. The Bird Pokemon. This Pokemon is Normal / Flying type, standing 1.5 meters tall and weighing 39.5 kilograms. When hunting, it skims the surface of water at high speed to pick off unwary prey such as Magikarp. Evolution: Pidgey to Pidgeotto to Pidgeot.

pidgeotto.spoken: Pidgeotto! National Number 17. The Bird Pokemon. This Pokemon is Normal / Flying type, standing 1.1 meters tall and weighing 30.0 kilograms. Very protective of its sprawling territorial area, this Pokemon will fiercely peck at any intruder. Evolution: Pidgey to Pidgeotto to Pidgeot.

pidgey.spoken: Pidgey! National Number 16. The Tiny Bird Pokemon. This Pokemon is Normal / Flying type, standing 0.3 meters tall and weighing 1.8 kilograms. A common sight in forests and woods. It flaps its wings at ground level to kick up blinding sand. Evolution: Pidgey to Pidgeotto to Pidgeot.

pikachu.spoken: Pikachu! National Number 25. The Mouse Pokemon. This Pokemon is Electric type, standing 0.4 meters tall and weighing 6.0 kilograms. When several of these Pokemon gather, their electricity could build and cause lightning storms. Evolution: Pichu to Pikachu to Raichu.

pinsir.spoken: Pinsir! National Number 127. The Stag Beetle Pokemon. This Pokemon is Bug type, standing 1.5 meters tall and weighing 55.0 kilograms. If it fails to crush the victim in its pincers, it will swing it around and toss it hard. Pinsir does not evolve.

poliwag.spoken: Poliwag! National Number 60. The Tadpole Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water type, standing 0.6 meters tall and weighing 12.4 kilograms. Its newly grown legs prevent it from running. It appears to prefer swimming than trying to stand. Evolution: Poliwag to Poliwhirl to Poliwrath to Politoed.

poliwhirl.spoken: Poliwhirl! National Number 61. The Tadpole Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water type, standing 1.0 meters tall and weighing 20.0 kilograms. Capable of living in or out of water. When out of water, it sweats to keep its body slimy. Evolution: Poliwag to Poliwhirl to Poliwrath to Politoed.

poliwrath.spoken: Poliwrath! National Number 62. The Tadpole Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water / Fighting type, standing 1.3 meters tall and weighing 54.0 kilograms. An adept swimmer at both the front crawl and breast stroke. Easily overtakes the best human swimmers. Evolution: Poliwag to Poliwhirl to Poliwrath to Politoed.

ponyta.spoken: Ponyta! National Number 77. The Fire Horse Pokemon. This Pokemon is Fire type, standing 1.0 meters tall and weighing 30.0 kilograms. Its hooves are 10 times harder than diamonds. It can trample anything completely flat in little time. Evolution: Ponyta to Rapidash.

porygon.spoken: Porygon! National Number 137. The Virtual Pokemon. This Pokemon is Normal type, standing 0.8 meters tall and weighing 36.5 kilograms. A Pokemon that consists entirely of programming code. Capable of moving freely in cyberspace. Evolution: Porygon to Porygon2 to Porygon Z.

primeape.spoken: Primeape! National Number 57. The Pig Monkey Pokemon. This Pokemon is Fighting type, standing 1.0 meters tall and weighing 32.0 kilograms. Always furious and tenacious to boot. It will not abandon chasing its quarry until it is caught. Evolution: Mankey to Primeape to Annihilape.

psyduck.spoken: Psyduck! National Number 54. The Duck Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water type, standing 0.8 meters tall and weighing 19.6 kilograms. While lulling its enemies with its vacant look, this wily Pokemon will use psychokinetic powers. Evolution: Psyduck to Golduck.

raichu.spoken: Raichu! National Number 26. The Mouse Pokemon. This Pokemon is Electric type, standing 0.8 meters tall and weighing 30.0 kilograms. Its long tail serves as a ground to protect itself from its own high voltage power. Evolution: Pichu to Pikachu to Raichu.

rapidash.spoken: Rapidash! National Number 78. The Fire Horse Pokemon. This Pokemon is Fire type, standing 1.7 meters tall and weighing 95.0 kilograms. Very competitive, this Pokemon will chase anything that moves fast in the hopes of racing it. Evolution: Ponyta to Rapidash.

raticate.spoken: Raticate! National Number 20. The Mouse Pokemon. This Pokemon is Normal type, standing 0.7 meters tall and weighing 18.5 kilograms. It uses its whis­ kers to maintain its balance. It apparently slows down if they are cut off. Evolution: Rattata to Raticate.

rattata.spoken: Rattata! National Number 19. The Mouse Pokemon. This Pokemon is Normal type, standing 0.3 meters tall and weighing 3.5 kilograms. Living wherever there is food available, it ceaselessly scav­ enges for edibles the entire day. Evolution: Rattata to Raticate.

rhydon.spoken: Rhydon! National Number 112. The Drill Pokemon. This Pokemon is Ground / Rock type, standing 1.9 meters tall and weighing 120.0 kilograms. Protected by an armor-like hide, it is capable of living in molten lava of 3,600 degrees. Evolution: Rhyhorn to Rhydon to Rhyperior.

rhyhorn.spoken: Rhyhorn! National Number 111. The Spikes Pokemon. This Pokemon is Ground / Rock type, standing 1.0 meters tall and weighing 115.0 kilograms. Its massive bones are 1000 times harder than human bones. It can easily knock a trailer flying. Evolution: Rhyhorn to Rhydon to Rhyperior.

sandshrew.spoken: Sandshrew! National Number 27. The Mouse Pokemon. This Pokemon is Ground type, standing 0.6 meters tall and weighing 12.0 kilograms. Burrows deep underground in arid locations far from water. It only emerges to hunt for food. Evolution: Sandshrew to Sandslash.

sandslash.spoken: Sandslash! National Number 28. The Mouse Pokemon. This Pokemon is Ground type, standing 1.0 meters tall and weighing 29.5 kilograms. Curls up into a spiny ball when threatened. It can roll while curled up to attack or escape. Evolution: Sandshrew to Sandslash.

scyther.spoken: Scyther! National Number 123. The Mantis Pokemon. This Pokemon is Bug / Flying type, standing 1.5 meters tall and weighing 56.0 kilograms. With ninja-like agility and speed, it can create the illusion that there is more than one. Evolution: Scyther to Scizor to Kleavor.

seadra.spoken: Seadra! National Number 117. The Dragon Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water type, standing 1.2 meters tall and weighing 25.0 kilograms. Capable of swim­ ming backwards by rapidly flapping its wing-like pectoral fins and stout tail. Evolution: Horsea to Seadra to Kingdra.

seaking.spoken: Seaking! National Number 119. The Goldfish Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water type, standing 1.3 meters tall and weighing 39.0 kilograms. In autumn, its body becomes more fatty in preparing to propose to a mate. It takes on beautiful colors. Evolution: Goldeen to Seaking.

seel.spoken: Seel! National Number 86. The Sea Lion Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water type, standing 1.1 meters tall and weighing 90.0 kilograms. The protruding horn on its head is very hard. It is used for bashing through thick ice. Evolution: Seel to Dewgong.

shellder.spoken: Shellder! National Number 90. The Bivalve Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water type, standing 0.3 meters tall and weighing 4.0 kilograms. Its hard shell repels any kind of attack. It is vulnerable only when its shell is open. Evolution: Shellder to Cloyster.

slowbro.spoken: Slowbro! National Number 80. The Hermit Crab Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water / Psychic type, standing 1.6 meters tall and weighing 78.5 kilograms. The Shellder that is latched onto Slowpoke's tail is said to feed on the host's left over scraps. Evolution: Slowpoke to Slowbro to Slowking.

slowpoke.spoken: Slowpoke! National Number 79. The Dopey Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water / Psychic type, standing 1.2 meters tall and weighing 36.0 kilograms. It is always so absent-minded that it won't react, even if its flavorful tail is bitten. Evolution: Slowpoke to Slowbro to Slowking.

snorlax.spoken: Snorlax! National Number 143. The Sleeping Pokemon. This Pokemon is Normal type, standing 2.1 meters tall and weighing 460.0 kilograms. Very lazy. Just eats and sleeps. As its rotund bulk builds, it becomes steadily more slothful. Evolution: Munchlax to Snorlax.

spearow.spoken: Spearow! National Number 21. The Tiny Bird Pokemon. This Pokemon is Normal / Flying type, standing 0.3 meters tall and weighing 2.0 kilograms. Eats bugs in grassy areas. It has to flap its short wings at high speed to stay airborne. Evolution: Spearow to Fearow.

squirtle.spoken: Squirtle! National Number 7. The Tiny Turtle Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water type, standing 0.5 meters tall and weighing 9.0 kilograms. After birth, its back swells and hardens into a shell. Powerfully sprays foam from its mouth. Evolution: Squirtle to Wartortle to Blastoise.

starmie.spoken: Starmie! National Number 121. The Mysterious Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water / Psychic type, standing 1.1 meters tall and weighing 80.0 kilograms. Its central core glows with the seven colors of the rainbow. Some people value the core as a gem. Evolution: Staryu to Starmie.

staryu.spoken: Staryu! National Number 120. The Star Shape Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water type, standing 0.8 meters tall and weighing 34.5 kilograms. An enigmatic Pokemon that can effortlessly regenerate any appendage it loses in battle. Evolution: Staryu to Starmie.

tangela.spoken: Tangela! National Number 114. The Vine Pokemon. This Pokemon is Grass type, standing 1.0 meters tall and weighing 35.0 kilograms. The whole body is swathed with wide vines that are similar to sea­ weed. Its vines shake as it walks. Evolution: Tangela to Tangrowth.

tauros.spoken: Tauros! National Number 128. The Wild Bull Pokemon. This Pokemon is Normal type, standing 1.4 meters tall and weighing 88.4 kilograms. When it targets an enemy, it charges furiously while whipping its body with its long tails. Tauros does not evolve.

tentacool.spoken: Tentacool! National Number 72. The Jellyfish Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water / Poison type, standing 0.9 meters tall and weighing 45.5 kilograms. Drifts in shallow seas. Anglers who hook them by accident are often punished by its stinging acid. Evolution: Tentacool to Tentacruel.

tentacruel.spoken: Tentacruel! National Number 73. The Jellyfish Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water / Poison type, standing 1.6 meters tall and weighing 55.0 kilograms. The tentacles are normally kept short. On hunts, they are extended to ensnare and immobilize prey. Evolution: Tentacool to Tentacruel.

vaporeon.spoken: Vaporeon! National Number 134. The Bubble Jet Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water type, standing 1.0 meters tall and weighing 29.0 kilograms. Lives close to water. Its long tail is ridged with a fin which is often mistaken for a mermaid's. Evolution: Eevee to Vaporeon to Jolteon to Flareon to Espeon to Umbreon to Leafeon to Glaceon to Sylveon.

venomoth.spoken: Venomoth! National Number 49. The Poison Moth Pokemon. This Pokemon is Bug / Poison type, standing 1.5 meters tall and weighing 12.5 kilograms. The dust-like scales covering its wings are color coded to indicate the kinds of poison it has. Evolution: Venonat to Venomoth.

venonat.spoken: Venonat! National Number 48. The Insect Pokemon. This Pokemon is Bug / Poison type, standing 1.0 meters tall and weighing 30.0 kilograms. Its big eyes are actually clusters of tiny eyes. At night, its kind is drawn by light. Evolution: Venonat to Venomoth.

venusaur.spoken: Venusaur! National Number 3. The Seed Pokemon. This Pokemon is Grass / Poison type, standing 2.0 meters tall and weighing 100.0 kilograms. The plant blooms when it is absorbing solar energy. It stays on the move to seek sunlight. Evolution: Bulbasaur to Ivysaur to Venusaur.

victreebel.spoken: Victreebel! National Number 71. The Flycatcher Pokemon. This Pokemon is Grass / Poison type, standing 1.7 meters tall and weighing 15.5 kilograms. Said to live in huge colonies deep in jungles, although no one has ever returned from there. Evolution: Bellsprout to Weepinbell to Victreebel.

vileplume.spoken: Vileplume! National Number 45. The Flower Pokemon. This Pokemon is Grass / Poison type, standing 1.2 meters tall and weighing 18.6 kilograms. The larger its petals, the more toxic pollen it contains. Its big head is heavy and hard to hold up. Evolution: Oddish to Gloom to Vileplume to Bellossom.

voltorb.spoken: Voltorb! National Number 100. The Ball Pokemon. This Pokemon is Electric type, standing 0.5 meters tall and weighing 10.4 kilograms. Usually found in power plants. Easily mistaken for a Poke Ball, they have zapped many people. Evolution: Voltorb to Electrode.

vulpix.spoken: Vulpix! National Number 37. The Fox Pokemon. This Pokemon is Fire type, standing 0.6 meters tall and weighing 9.9 kilograms. At the time of birth, it has just one tail. The tail splits from its tip as it grows older. Evolution: Vulpix to Ninetales.

wartortle.spoken: Wartortle! National Number 8. The Turtle Pokemon. This Pokemon is Water type, standing 1.0 meters tall and weighing 22.5 kilograms. Often hides in water to stalk unwary prey. For swimming fast, it moves its ears to maintain balance. Evolution: Squirtle to Wartortle to Blastoise.

weedle.spoken: Weedle! National Number 13. The Hairy Bug Pokemon. This Pokemon is Bug / Poison type, standing 0.3 meters tall and weighing 3.2 kilograms. Often found in forests, eating leaves. It has a sharp venomous stinger on its head. Evolution: Weedle to Kakuna to Beedrill.

weepinbell.spoken: Weepinbell! National Number 70. The Flycatcher Pokemon. This Pokemon is Grass / Poison type, standing 1.0 meters tall and weighing 6.4 kilograms. A Pokemon that appears to be a plant. It captures unwary prey by dousing them with a toxic powder. Evolution: Bellsprout to Weepinbell to Victreebel.

weezing.spoken: Weezing! National Number 110. The Poison Gas Pokemon. This Pokemon is Poison type, standing 1.2 meters tall and weighing 9.5 kilograms. Where two kinds of poison gases meet, 2 Koffings can fuse into a Weezing over many years. Evolution: Koffing to Weezing.

wigglytuff.spoken: Wigglytuff! National Number 40. The Balloon Pokemon. This Pokemon is Normal / Fairy type, standing 1.0 meters tall and weighing 12.0 kilograms. The body is soft and rubbery. When angered, it will suck in air and inflate itself to an enormous size. Evolution: Igglybuff to Jigglypuff to Wigglytuff.

zapdos.spoken: Zapdos! National Number 145. The Electric Pokemon. This Pokemon is Electric / Flying type, standing 1.6 meters tall and weighing 52.6 kilograms. A legendary bird Pokemon that is said to appear from clouds while dropping enormous lightning bolts. Zapdos does not evolve.

zubat.spoken: Zubat! National Number 41. The Bat Pokemon. This Pokemon is Poison / Flying type, standing 0.8 meters tall and weighing 7.5 kilograms. It has no eyes. Instead, it relies on its ultrasonic cries for echolocation to flit about in darkness. Evolution: Zubat to Golbat to Crobat.
